@props(['routing']) <div class="flex flex-col gap-3"> <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">Routing</h2> <div class="flex flex-col"> @forelse ($routing as $key => $value) <div class="flex max-w-full items-baseline gap-2 h-10 text-sm font-mono"> <div class="uppercase text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400 shrink-0">{{ $key }}</div> <div class="min-w-6 grow h-3 border-b-2 border-dotted border-neutral-300 dark:border-white/20"></div> <div class="truncate text-neutral-900 dark:text-white"> <span data-tippy-content="{{ $value }}"> {{ $value }} </span> </div> </div> @empty <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::empty-state message="No routing context" /> @endforelse </div> </div>
